title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology highlights a shift in AI labs from maximizing model size to implementing smart routing strategies. The approach prioritizes cost efficiency and trustworthiness by intelligently directing tasks across different models rather than defaulting to the largest available model.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains smart AI routing, a shift among AI labs away from maximizing model size toward directing tasks across different models. The approach matters because defaulting to the largest available model is costly, and routing prioritizes cost efficiency and trustworthiness instead. The key takeaways: tier routing and model routing send each task to an appropriate model rather than the biggest one, which reduces cost.
